title: Lesson 13
paragraph: Action verbs for people and daily life.

words.meaning: to do a job or task
words.example: I work at a small store.

words.meaning: to make something easier for someone
words.example: I help my sister with homework.

words.meaning: to have clothes on your body
words.example: I wear a jacket on cold days.

words.meaning: to see and talk to someone
words.example: I meet my friend at the station.

words.meaning: to use a knife or scissors on something
to get new knowledge or skill

words.example: The students clap after the song.

words.meaning: to hold someone with your arms
words.example: I hug my grandma when I see her.

words.meaning: to touch someone with your lips
words.example: She kisses her baby good night.
